templates.purpose: Capture persistence in medium-horizon trend signals with lower churn than fast breakout systems.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when fast and slow return windows align, trend slope is positive, and volatility remains below the crowding cap.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on trend break, risk-off regime change, or momentum decay below threshold.
templates.stop_logic_structure: ATR-normalized stop with slower trailing logic than breakout templates.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use volatility-scaled size and cap exposure when trend age becomes extended.

templates.purpose: Follow liquid post-earnings winners while the drift window remains open.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter after large earnings surprise gap if relative strength and post-event volume remain supportive on day one.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on gap fill, drift decay, or predefined holding window expiration.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop below post-event support or prior day low.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size immediately after gap day and add only if trend structure remains orderly.

templates.purpose: Fade temporary overreaction where short-horizon flow outruns the broader regime.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter contra move after one-day or five-day stretch reaches threshold and liquidity remains sufficient.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at partial mean reversion target, VWAP reset, or timeout.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Hard stop if extension re-accelerates in the original direction.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Keep size small because this strategy trades against local trend pressure.

templates.purpose: Exploit temporary spread dislocations in stable relative-value pairs.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when pair spread exceeds z-score threshold while common-factor alignment and liquidity remain healthy.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when spread normalizes or holding window expires.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop if spread keeps widening and structural divergence is confirmed.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size pair legs by beta balance and liquidity, not headline conviction.

templates.purpose: Rank and rotate into cheaper high-quality names instead of treating value and quality separately.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Select top-ranked basket by blended value-quality score with profitability and investment discipline filters.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Rebalance on cadence or exit when composite rank falls below threshold.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Portfolio-level risk budget and sector cap replace tight single-name stops.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Weight by rank while penalizing crowding and turnover.

templates.purpose: Favor low-beta, shallower-drawdown baskets when the market is paying too much for high-octane upside.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Select lower-beta basket when beta dispersion is wide and sector balance remains acceptable.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Rebalance on cadence or exit when risk-on regime strongly reasserts itself.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Use portfolio drawdown and exposure caps rather than tight tactical stops.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size to volatility parity and keep concentration low.

templates.purpose: Tilt allocation toward recently winning factors and strategy families while the persistence window remains intact.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Increase weight on families whose factor return rank and dispersion remain supportive across the latest rebalance window.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Reduce overlay when factor leadership flips or crowding breaches cap.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Overlay only; it cannot override hard execution or portfolio risk boundaries.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Keep overlay weight capped and secondary to base signal quality.

templates.purpose: Capture crypto carry when funding and basis remain supportive without obvious stress compression.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when carry score is positive, basis confirms, and funding is not yet at squeeze levels.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when carry decays, basis compresses, or market stress spikes.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Use stress-trigger exit and leverage cap before directional stop logic.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size off carry quality and sharply reduce exposure under risk-off pressure.

templates.purpose: Follow short attention-driven continuation bursts in liquid crypto names while crowding remains contained.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when attention shock, relative strength, and volume expansion align before funding fully catches up.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on attention decay, loss of relative strength, or adverse funding acceleration.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Tight stop because attention-led bursts can reverse quickly.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size than systematic trend or carry strategies.
